title: gonocarpus pusillus
intro: Gonocarpus pusillus, also known as the small broom fern or small button fern, is a species of fern in the family Haloragaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Gonocarpus pusillus include reducing inflammation, relieving coughs, and soothing irritated mucous membranes. In herbal preparations, the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often used to address respiratory problems and promote overall well-being.
